summary: Iteration 80: Video Quality Review - All 22 tests passed. Verified video pipeline quality upgrades: CRF values upgraded to 16/18 (no CRF 23), preset 'slow' in main pipeline, scale+crop normalization for exact resolution, target_size parameter passing, audio pre-approval logic, VIDEO_PLATFORM_FORMATS configuration, audio bitrate 256k/320k, and approve-audio endpoint.

minor.issue: Presenter video branding uses preset 'fast' and CRF 18 (acceptable per requirements - branding operations can use fast preset)

details: Frontend testing not requested for this iteration

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 80 verified all video quality upgrades: (1) CRF values: All main pipeline uses CRF 16 or 18 (no CRF 23). (2) Preset: Main pipeline uses 'slow' preset; branding operations use 'fast' (acceptable). (3) Normalization: Uses scale+crop with force_original_aspect_ratio=increase to fill frame without black bars. (4) target_size: _combine_commercial_video accepts target_size param, _generate_commercial_video passes target_size=size. (5) Audio pre-approval: marcos_video sets waiting_audio_approval status and returns before video generation. (6) VIDEO_PLATFORM_FORMATS: Has entries for tiktok, instagram, facebook, whatsapp, youtube with correct w/h/label structure. (7) Audio bitrate: 256k and 320k (no 192k). (8) approve-audio endpoint: Exists, returns 404 for non-existent pipeline, validates waiting_audio_approval status. Sora 2 only supports 1280x720 or 720x1280.

features_verified.crf_values: ✓ All CRF values are 16 or 18 (cinema quality)
features_verified.normalization_scale_crop: ✓ Uses scale+crop for exact resolution (no black bars)
features_verified.audio_pre_approval: ✓ marcos_video sets waiting_audio_approval and returns before video gen
features_verified.video_platform_formats: ✓ Has tiktok, instagram, facebook, whatsapp, youtube entries

quality_changes_summary.audio_merge: Now uses CRF 16 instead of -c:v copy
